summary: Manual spec review approved GH-170 Task Thread content migration at head 31ac5821631cbac2b2cfb9d2d025b33c306275d3. The spec is scoped to migrating existing #93/#94/#95 fixture content into the confirmed Codex-like shell while preserving WebEnvoy semantics for Task, Run, Evidence, Identity, Site Skill, and Harbor Session. It does not approve GH-171 fidelity QA, Stage 5, live Core/Harbor/Lode calls, real task submission, real run record truth, or real function/data contracts. Post-review drift after this record must remain limited to GH-170 review carriers or PR metadata.
reviewed_validation_summary: CodeGraph exploration completed before implementation for restored Codex `threads/thread-layout.tsx`, `threads/thread-scroll-layout/index.tsx`, `LocalConversationThreadFrame`, `LocalConversationThreadBodyLayout`, and this repo's `ThreadWorkspace`, `BottomPanelSlot`, `ThreadNavigationRail`, task fixtures, and right inspector. `npm run build`, `WEBENVOY_PACKAGED_SMOKE_SCREENSHOT=artifacts/gh-170-task-thread-migration.png npm run smoke:packaged`, `git diff --check`, `loom doctor --target . --json`, `loom verify --target . --json`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-170 --json`, `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-170 --json`, and `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item GH-170 --json` passed. Screenshots: `artifacts/gh-170-before-task-thread.png`, `artifacts/gh-170-task-thread-migration.png`.
follow_ups: After GH-170 merge/closeout, run GH-171 fidelity QA before closing parent #167.
Do not connect live Core/Harbor/Lode or treat fixture functions/data structures as real implementation contracts in this PR.
Future feature/data integration must still go through UI design, review, and walkthrough.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The GH-170 spec, plan, implementation contract, task carrier, build evidence, evidence map, screenshots, and renderer changes all describe the same bounded fixture-content migration. The spec explicitly excludes final fidelity QA, Stage 5, live owner-runtime contracts, and real data contracts.

consumed_inputs.suite_validation: loom suite validate --target . --item GH-170 --json; loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-170 --json; loom suite evidence validate --target . --item GH-170 --json
consumed_inputs.scope_boundary: Task Thread fixture-content migration only; no GH-171 QA completion, no Stage 5, no live Core/Harbor/Lode, and no real function/data contract approval.
